name: Curried Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Roll each chicken breast in flour. Melt butter in a skillet and brown the chicken. Remove and place in a baking dish.
3. Add the chopped onion and garlic to the butter and cook until the onion is golden.
4. Add curry powder, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add flour and chicken broth, whisking until smooth. Pour sauce over the chicken, cover with foil, and bake for 1 hour.
6. Before serving, add lime juice.
